en.tool.description: Get detailed info about a specific UPnP device by its description URL (location) or IP address. Returns device metadata, service list, and device tree (sub-devices).
en.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
en.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

ar.tool.description: احصل على معلومات تفصيلية حول جهاز UPnP محدد من خلال عنوان URL الوصفي (الموقع) أو عنوان IP الخاص به. إرجاع البيانات التعريفية للجهاز وقائمة الخدمات وشجرة الأجهزة (الأجهزة الفرعية).
ar.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
ar.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

bn.tool.description: প্রসেস করার জন্য প্রয়োজনীয় ক্ষেত্র বা স্কিমা অমিলকে বিবেচনা করুন। প্যাচ_ডিজাইনার, ত্রুটি_বিশ্লেষক, বা অনুবাদক) মেটাডেটা, সার্ভিস লিস্ট, এবং ডিভাইস ট্রি (সাব-ডিভাইস)
bn.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
bn.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

cs.tool.description: Získejte podrobné informace o konkrétním zařízení UPnP podle jeho adresy URL (umístění) nebo IP adresy. Vrátí metadata zařízení, seznam služeb a strom zařízení (podzařízení).
cs.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
cs.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

de.tool.description: Erhalten Sie detaillierte Informationen zu einem bestimmten UPnP-Gerät anhand seiner Beschreibungs-URL (Standort) oder IP-Adresse. Gibt Gerätemetadaten, Dienstliste und Gerätebaum (Untergeräte) zurück.
de.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
de.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

es.tool.description: Obtenga información detallada sobre un dispositivo UPnP específico mediante su descripción URL (ubicación) o dirección IP. Devuelve metadatos del dispositivo, lista de servicios y árbol de dispositivos (subdispositivos).
es.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
es.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

fa.tool.description: اطلاعات دقیقی در مورد یک دستگاه UPnP خاص از طریق URL توضیحات (موقعیت) یا آدرس IP دریافت کنید. فراداده دستگاه، فهرست خدمات و درخت دستگاه (دستگاه‌های فرعی) را برمی‌گرداند.
fa.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
fa.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

fi.tool.description: Hanki yksityiskohtaista tietoa tietystä UPnP-laitteesta sen kuvaus-URL-osoitteen (sijainnin) tai IP-osoitteen avulla. Palauttaa laitteen metatiedot, palveluluettelon ja laitepuun (alilaitteet).
fi.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
fi.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

fr.tool.description: Obtenez des informations détaillées sur un périphérique UPnP spécifique par son URL de description (emplacement) ou son adresse IP. Renvoie les métadonnées de l'appareil, la liste des services et l'arborescence des appareils (sous-appareils).
fr.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
fr.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

hi.tool.description: किसी विशिष्ट UPnP डिवाइस के बारे में उसके विवरण URL (स्थान) या IP पते द्वारा विस्तृत जानकारी प्राप्त करें।
hi.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
hi.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

id.tool.description: Dapatkan info detail tentang perangkat UPnP tertentu berdasarkan URL deskripsi (lokasi) atau alamat IP. Mengembalikan metadata perangkat, daftar layanan, dan pohon perangkat (sub-perangkat).
id.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
id.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

it.tool.description: Ottieni informazioni dettagliate su un dispositivo UPnP specifico tramite l'URL di descrizione (posizione) o l'indirizzo IP. Restituisce i metadati del dispositivo, l'elenco dei servizi e la struttura dei dispositivi (sottodispositivi).
it.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
it.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

ko.tool.description: 설명 URL(위치) 또는 IP 주소를 통해 특정 UPnP 장치에 대한 자세한 정보를 가져옵니다. 장치 메타데이터, 서비스 목록 및 장치 트리(하위 장치)를 반환합니다.
ko.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
ko.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

mn.tool.description: Тодорхой UPnP төхөөрөмжийн талаарх дэлгэрэнгүй мэдээллийг түүний тайлбарын URL (байршил) эсвэл IP хаягаар авна уу. Төхөөрөмжийн мета өгөгдөл, үйлчилгээний жагсаалт болон төхөөрөмжийн модыг (дэд төхөөрөмж) буцаана.
mn.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
mn.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

mr.tool.description: विशिष्ट UPnP डिव्हाइसबद्दल तपशीलवार माहिती त्याच्या वर्णन URL (स्थान) किंवा IP पत्त्याद्वारे मिळवा. डिव्हाइस मेटाडेटा, सेवा सूची आणि डिव्हाइस ट्री (उप-डिव्हाइस) मिळवते.
mr.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
mr.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

nb.tool.description: Få detaljert informasjon om en spesifikk UPnP-enhet ved dens beskrivelses-URL (plassering) eller IP-adresse. Returnerer enhetsmetadata, tjenesteliste og enhetstre (underenheter).
nb.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
nb.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

nl.tool.description: Krijg gedetailleerde informatie over een specifiek UPnP-apparaat via de beschrijvings-URL (locatie) of IP-adres. Retourneert metagegevens van het apparaat, de servicelijst en de apparaatstructuur (subapparaten).
nl.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
nl.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

pl.tool.description: Uzyskaj szczegółowe informacje o konkretnym urządzeniu UPnP na podstawie jego opisu URL (lokalizacji) lub adresu IP. Zwraca metadane urządzenia, listę usług i drzewo urządzeń (urządzenia podrzędne).
pl.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
pl.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

pt.tool.description: Obtenha informações detalhadas sobre um dispositivo UPnP específico por meio de seu URL de descrição (localização) ou endereço IP. Retorna metadados de dispositivos, lista de serviços e árvore de dispositivos (subdispositivos).
pt.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
pt.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

pt_BR.tool.description: Obtenha informações detalhadas sobre um dispositivo UPnP específico por meio de seu URL de descrição (localização) ou endereço IP. Retorna metadados de dispositivos, lista de serviços e árvore de dispositivos (subdispositivos).
pt_BR.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
pt_BR.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

ru.tool.description: Получите подробную информацию о конкретном устройстве UPnP по URL-адресу его описания (местоположению) или IP-адресу. Возвращает метаданные устройства, список сервисов и дерево устройств (подустройства).
ru.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
ru.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

sv.tool.description: Få detaljerad information om en specifik UPnP-enhet genom dess beskrivnings-URL (plats) eller IP-adress. Returnerar enhetens metadata, tjänstelista och enhetsträd (underenheter).
sv.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
sv.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

sw.tool.description: Pata maelezo ya kina kuhusu kifaa mahususi cha UPnP kwa maelezo yake ya URL (mahali) au anwani ya IP. Hurejesha metadata ya kifaa, orodha ya huduma na mti wa kifaa (vifaa vidogo).
sw.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
sw.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

th.tool.description: รับข้อมูลโดยละเอียดเกี่ยวกับอุปกรณ์ UPnP เฉพาะตาม URL คำอธิบาย (ตำแหน่ง) หรือที่อยู่ IP ส่งคืนข้อมูลเมตาของอุปกรณ์ รายการบริการ และแผนผังอุปกรณ์ (อุปกรณ์ย่อย)
th.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
th.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

tr.tool.description: Açıklama URL'sine (konumuna) veya IP adresine göre belirli bir UPnP cihazı hakkında ayrıntılı bilgi alın. Cihaz meta verilerini, hizmet listesini ve cihaz ağacını (alt cihazlar) döndürür.
tr.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
tr.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

uk.tool.description: Отримайте детальну інформацію про конкретний пристрій UPnP за URL-адресою опису (розташування) або IP-адресою. Повертає метадані пристрою, список послуг і дерево пристроїв (підпристрої).
uk.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
uk.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

vi.tool.description: Nhận thông tin chi tiết về một thiết bị UPnP cụ thể theo URL mô tả (vị trí) hoặc địa chỉ IP của thiết bị đó. Trả về siêu dữ liệu thiết bị, danh sách dịch vụ và cây thiết bị (thiết bị phụ).
vi.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
vi.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

zh_CN.tool.description: 通过其描述 URL（位置）或 IP 地址获取有关特定 UPnP 设备的详细信息。返回设备元数据、服务列表和设备树（子设备）。
zh_CN.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
zh_CN.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

zh_TW.tool.description: 透過其描述 URL（位置）或 IP 位址取得特定 UPnP 裝置的詳細資訊。傳回設備元資料、服務清單和設備樹（子設備）。
zh_TW.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
zh_TW.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).

ja.tool.description: Get detailed info about a specific UPnP device by its description URL (location) or IP address. Returns device metadata, service list, and device tree (sub-devices).
ja.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
ja.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).
